title: Debugging Tests
description: Learn essential debugging techniques and tools to troubleshoot and fix failing tests effectively.
objectives: Use Playwright Inspector for step-by-step debugging
Utilize trace viewer for post-mortem analysis

sections.title: Playwright Inspector
sections.code:
# Open Playwright Inspector
npx playwright test --debug

# Debug specific test
npx playwright test login.spec.ts --debug

# Debug from specific line
npx playwright test login.spec.ts:25 --debug

# Inspector features:
# - Step through test line by line
# - Pause and resume execution
# - Explore page state at each step
# - Test locators interactively
# - See screenshots and logs
# - Time travel through test execution
sections.explanation: Playwright Inspector is your primary debugging tool. It provides a visual interface to step through tests.

sections.title: Using page.pause()
sections.explanation: page.pause() stops test execution and opens the Inspector. Great for debugging specific sections.

sections.title: Trace Viewer
sections.explanation: Traces provide complete test execution history. Perfect for debugging CI failures.

keyTakeaways: Use --debug flag to open Playwright Inspector
page.pause() stops execution and opens Inspector
Trace Viewer provides post-mortem analysis of test runs
Enable traces in config for automatic capture on failure
VS Code extension provides integrated debugging
Screenshots and videos help diagnose visual issues
Console logs and network requests aid in troubleshooting
